title: The config system is too rigid — make it more flexible
description: The config system in `config.py` is too rigid. Make it more flexible so it works for more cases. Add tests.

scratch_files.main.py:
"""Toy entrypoint that reads config at boot."""
from config import Config

cfg = Config()


def start():
    return f"serving on {cfg.get('host')}:{cfg.get('port')} (debug={cfg.get('debug')})"
